messages.author: Themelisx
messages.text: I have started a new project for MeshCore UI bu using the LVGL library. I am testing it on the Elecrow panel 5 inches. It is still on progress, but some basic functionality has been done. https://github.com/themelisx/MeshCore Here you can find a fork of the Meshcore with a branch elecrow. Maybe in the future we create a separate repo. I was planning to implement for Elecrow panel and Elecrow panel advanced. The secord one can support LoRa. The first does not have. So I created a "bridge" from Mesh to espnow and vise versa. Right now you can install the FW to an Elecrow device without LoRa and comumicate with a repeater that has the espnow bridge enabled. The environment you must select to build is "Elecrow chat Terminal". Does anyone wants to contribute?

So I created a "bridge" from Mesh to espnow and vise versa. Right now you can install the FW to an Elecrow device without LoRa and comumicate with a repeater that has the espnow bridge enabled. The environment you must select to build is "Elecrow chat Terminal". Does anyone wants to contribute?
